title: Guest discovers profiles
when: When they search and filter profiles
then: Then active profiles are listed and save/follow/request actions require authentication

title: Authenticated user builds profile with paid prices
when: When they upload avatar, complete required fields, choose org level and prices under caps, then submit

title: Price cap validation blocks higher price
given: Given a user selects کارشناس ارشد
when: When they enter ۳۰ دقیقه above ۵۰۰٬۰۰۰ or ۱ ساعت above ۹۰۰٬۰۰۰
then: Then the form shows cap validation error and cannot submit

title: Free help disables price inputs
given: Given a user is building profile
then: Then both prices become 0, inputs are disabled and preview shows رایگان

title: Provider proposes times
given: Given a provider has a received request
when: When they select fewer than 3 times
then: Then submit is disabled; when selecting 3 to 6 unique times submit succeeds

title: Seeker selects proposed time and pays
given: Given a seeker has time options
when: When they choose one and complete checkout

title: Wallet insufficient balance
given: Given wallet balance is less than conversation price
then: Then wallet deduction and gateway payable amount are shown

title: Payout blocked without IBAN
given: Given provider has available payout but no settlement info
then: Then settlement info form is required

title: IBAN validation
when: When IBAN is not IR plus 24 digits
then: Then save is blocked with validation error

title: Network saved list
when: When they open /profile/network saved tab and search/filter
then: Then matching saved profiles are listed

title: Notification deep link
given: Given user has an unread conversation notification
then: Then notification becomes read and user is routed to conversations

title: Feedback after successful conversation
then: Then feedback appears in provider received feedback page
